title: State Drug Alert: CDSCO Flags 78 NSQ, Spurious, Misbranded Drug Samples in April Quality Checks
summary: New Delhi: Reflecting continuing concerns over medicine quality and regulatory compliance in India's pharmaceutical market, the Central Drugs Standard Control Organisation (CDSCO) has flagged 78 drug,...
thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.
